content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


July 3, 2002


David B. De Luz
California State University, Sacramento
6000 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95819-6081

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-106

Dear Mr. De Luz:

Pursuant to your conversation with John W. Wallace, Assistant General Counsel, on July 2, 2002, this letter confirms the withdrawal of your request for advice.

Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division

GW:jg

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to David B. De Luz, regarding his request for advice. The Commission confirms the withdrawal of Mr. De Luz's request for advice and advises him to contact them at (916) 322-5660 if he has any additional questions or comments. The letter is signed by Luisa Menchaca, General Counsel, and Galena West, Counsel, Legal Division.
